creator: bz@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Tijl Coosemans from comment #2)

One you can probably test with would be linux-firefox (which the handbook[1] btw. still says we provide but don't seem to).

The other software is proprietary.

If there's a good recipe on how to do these ports, I can try do the basics of creating them and their dependencies (even if not fully ports framework compliant) once I am back from vacation and submit them so someone can polish them up to proper ports standards.  Would that help?



[1] https://www.freebsd.org/doc/en_US.ISO8859-1/books/handbook/desktop-browsers.html
